title: verbascum decursivum
intro: Verbascum decursivum, also known as the small mullein, is a biennial or perennial plant species belonging to the mullein genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves and flowers of Verbascum decursivum have been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe sore throats, calm skin irritations, and promote overall well-being.
